title: Villager Quests
description: Villagers offer persistent, profession-based quests with custom rewards. Progress is saved per player and villager. Fully modpack compatible.
body:
Adds a persistent quest system for villagers: each villager offers unique, profession-based quests with custom rewards. Quests are saved per player and villager, with cooldowns, progress tracking, and a dedicated quest button in the trading menu. Fully compatible with modpacks and all modded items.

**New in v1.0.1:**
- Fixed quest descriptions and translations - all quest objectives now display properly translated names
- Improved quest generation - villagers now offer 1-2 objectives maximum instead of overwhelming requests
- Fixed quest abandonment - `/quest abandon <id>` now works correctly and removes quests from active list
- Enhanced quest commands - `/quest list` now shows properly translated quest titles
- Fixed entity translations - monster names like "Spider", "Zombie" are now correctly translated
- Improved quest dialog - "No" button now closes immediately instead of requiring double-click
- Fixed NBT serialization crash that occurred during quest saving
- Added comprehensive French and English translations for all quest elements

**Features:**
- Persistent quest system with individual villager tracking
- Profession-specific quest objectives (farming, fishing, hunting, crafting, etc.)
- Custom rewards based on villager profession
- Quest progress tracking and completion system
- Cooldown system to prevent quest spam
- Dedicated quest button in villager trading interface
- Full modpack compatibility with all modded items
- Comprehensive translation support (French/English)

If you encounter any bugs, please report them at [VillagerQuest-Issues](https://github.com/MidacoYT/VillagerQuests-Issues). You can also share your suggestions or ideas for new features there!
